name: podc-skills
description: Depth pack for ACM PODC manuscript routing, lightweight double-blind submission, the 10-page proceedings budget with an unbounded full version, proof-appendix and model/assumption rigor, the Brief Announcements track, the arXiv full-version norm, and PODC camera-ready work.

plugins.name: podc-skills
plugins.description: Twelve PODC-specific skills for the ACM Symposium on Principles of Distributed Computing (distributed-computing theory), grounded in the PODC 2026 call for papers, podc.org, the ACM Digital Library, and dblp.
